title: Flame of the Infinite buffs your creatures

card.rawText: All creatures under your control: AL: +5. SPD: +5. Atk: +5. Atk Dice Rolls: +1. Hit Dice Rolls: +1. If destroyed, +50 HP to your cemetery.

effect.value: AL +5; SPD +5; Atk +5; Atk Dice Rolls +1; Hit Dice Rolls +1

plan.title: Flame of the Infinite buffs your creatures
plan.summary: Play Flame of the Infinite as field magic and verify its controller's primary creature gains the printed stat and dice bonuses.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the field aura bonuses come only from Flame of the Infinite.

steps: Player 1 plays Flame of the Infinite as field magic.
Read player_1 primary creature effective AL, SPD, and attack dice.
Run a follow-up battle and inspect Hit and Atk output.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes the +5 Atk bonus
Flame of the Infinite remains in magic slot

manualVerification: Confirm the field aura affects all of its controller's creatures, not opponent creatures.
riskNotes: This fixture covers the field aura sentence, not the destroyed cemetery HP sentence.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
